name: @zcaceres/skill-quality-snyk
description: Set up Snyk on a repo. The integration is a GitHub App plus a Snyk-side 'import this repo as a project' step, not a checked-in config, so most of the skill is walking the user through the three browser steps (Snyk login → GitHub App install → Add project) and then verifying via the GitHub API that the App actually landed on the right account. Pre-flips 'Automatic fix PRs' off so the install doesn't dump a backlog of fix PRs into the repo. Optionally scaffolds a pinned CI workflow that runs `snyk code test` (SAST), which isn't covered by the App's free tier dependency-CVE scanning. User-triggered only — activate when the user invokes '/quality-snyk'.
